items.title: India's Adanis agree to pay $18m to settle civil fraud case in the US
items.dek: The US securities regulator had accused the Adanis of paying bribes and misleading investors, which they denied.
items.body: The US securities regulator had accused the Adanis of paying bribes and misleading investors, which they denied.
items.author: IriLine Desk
